---
name: Challenge help
about: Ask a question about a specific CTF challenge
title: "[CHALLENGE] "
labels: question
assignees: madebygps

---

**Which challenge number?**
[e.g. Challenge 6]

**What have you tried so far?**
Describe the commands you've run and what you've attempted.

**What output did you get?**
```
<paste relevant command output here>
```

**Are you stuck on:**
- [ ] Finding the flag
- [ ] Submitting the flag (verify command not working)
- [ ] Understanding the challenge objective

**Have you tried:**
- [ ] Running `verify hint <challenge_number>` for a hint
- [ ] Re-reading the challenge description in the MOTD or README
